about.title: CMC Incubator Space
about.subtitle: A support structure dedicated to project founders, early-stage startups and OFPPT trainees.
about.section1Title: A structure dedicated to project founders
about.section1Text1: An incubator space is a support structure dedicated to project founders and startups in the seed phase.
about.section1Text2: Our action is based on mutual support, solidarity, orientation, ideation workshops, mentoring and connections with partner companies.
about.storyImageAlt: Founders collaborating in an incubator workspace
about.missionText: Support trainees and project founders in developing their ideas, preparing competitions, building business plans, pitching and finding opportunities.
about.visionText: Bring the entrepreneurial experience to trainees, encourage autonomy and turn ideas into concrete projects.
about.advantageSub: The incubator offer combines individualized support, ideation, mentoring and partner connections.
about.adv1Desc: Individual follow-up for project founders according to their needs and stage of progress.
about.adv2Desc: Brainstorming, focus groups and workshops to generate and structure ideas.
about.adv3Desc: Guidance, coaching, pitch preparation and discovery of opportunities.
about.adv4Desc: Connections with partner companies, programs and financing actors.
about.app1Desc: Introduce entrepreneurship, programs and the innovation chain.
about.app2Desc: Develop skills in business plans, pitching, financing and service catalogs.
about.app3Desc: Follow projects, prepare competitions and turn ideas into achievements.
about.responsibleDescription: She supports project founders, coordinates incubator activities, and helps animate the CMC BMK entrepreneurial ecosystem.
about.ctaTitle: Join the incubator and turn your idea into a project
about.ctaSub: Benefit from support, training and a network of partners.
about.profileEntrepreneurshipDescription: She supports project founders in structuring, creating, and launching their businesses.
about.profileFablabDescription: She supports projects through design, prototyping, and solution testing within the Fablab.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions
faq.sideText: Everything you need to understand the incubator process, selection and support model.
faq.ctaText: Send us your question and the incubator team will get back to you.
faq.q1: What is the CMC BMK incubator?
faq.a1: The CMC Beni Mellal-Khenifra incubator is a support structure for innovative project leaders in the region. We offer mentoring, training, workspaces, and access to a partner network.
faq.a2: Anyone or any team with an innovative project idea can apply. Students, recent graduates, and entrepreneurs are especially welcome.
faq.q3: How does the selection process work?
faq.a3: Submitted projects are reviewed by our selection committee. Shortlisted candidates are invited to present their project in person. Selected projects receive complete support.
faq.q4: What are the benefits of joining the incubator?
faq.a4: You benefit from personalized support, workspace, training, a network of mentors and partners, and increased visibility for your project.
faq.a5: Yes, basic support is free. Some specific programs may have particular conditions.
faq.q6: How do I track my submission status?
faq.a6: After submitting your project, you receive a reference code. Use it in the 'My Submissions' section to track your application progress.
